Effect: A character has a pool of charges equal to the sum of the block charges of their worn armour. For no action, a creature can expend 1 charge and gain their armours hardness attribute against 1 instance of Bludgening, Slashing or Piercing damage.
A combination of armour's weight class is determined by the number of weight keywords it has. A creature can fight normally in an armour combination no more than its STR mod.

A creature gains the sum of all worn armour hardness. If a creature or object takes Bludgening, Slashing or Piercing damage less than their Hardness value. They instead take 0 damage from that source. Mixed damage type attacks are affected, but only the appropriate damage types are negated, however the total damage is still calculated with all types.
Items with this keyword are relativly common and wont be thought of as unusuall in most situations. Ex. Walking into a store in splint mail is weird. Wearing a dublet is not
Enemies with the swarm keyword take max damage from any area effect damage that covers half or more of their occupied space. Save for half still applies
